name: OnIpAddressAdded
title: OnIpAddressAdded
syntax: void OnIpAddressAdded(dword ifIndex, ip_address address, dword prefix, dword origin);
description: If the CAPL program implements this callback it is called when a new address is added to a network interface.

parameters.name: prefix
parameters.description: The prefix of the added address. It defines the number of bits belonging to the network part of the address.

parameters.name: origin
parameters.description: Defines the initiator for adding this address. Possible values are: ORIGIN_UNKNOWN = 0, ORIGIN_USER = 1, ORIGIN_SYSTEM = 2, ORIGIN_DHCPv4CLIENT = 3, ORIGIN_DHCPv6CLIENT = 4, ORIGIN_RFC3927CLIENT = 5

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
